name: Obsidia - Rulers of the Underworld Want You to Breed Their Daughter?!
description:
"W-Well then, I guess... F-Feel free to... dig in... and... Give me plenty amounts of your seed~"

You've been summoned to the capital of the Underworld by the Demon King and Queen themselves! Why you might ask? Well that's simple! They want you to breed their daughter to your hearts content! Why, you might ask again? Well that's even simpler! By ancient demon tradition, the eldest daughter of the Royal Demon Family is to bear as many children as she possibly can before she is to succeed her parents and take authority and rule over the entire Underworld! The only problem is, if you're willing and ready to become a part of the royal family yourself!


This scenario is a pretty unique one in my opinion, 'cuz I've made a few demonic female bots in the past, but none as wild as this one. I've made it even more interesting by making Obsidia, aka the eldest daughter of the demon king and queen, into a somewhat shy and self-conscious girl. Since she's supposed to be quite powerful and important in the Underworld, I thought it would be boring to give her the usual cocky and confident personality, instead she's quite the opposite, hopefully making for some pretty good scenarios to happen.

P.S: I highly recommend you read the character definition to make sure you know what's going on at the start of the story, as going in blind might just make you feel lost and make you lose all interest in the bot!!!


With that all said and done, I've got an announcement to make! My very own discord server! It's finally done and ready for everyone who's interested and willing to join and have fun in general. I'll be posting sneak peeks of future and upcoming bots, you'll all be able to vote for bots as well! And the best part? Reach a certain level in the server by engaging and chatting with others, and you'll unlock a special channel where you're able to suggest a bot directly to me, instead of here in the reviews of my bots, making it a higher chance I'll notice your suggestion and even possibly make it!

Feel free to join and make sure to read the announcements and rules channel after you've done so!

Discord Server Link


Also, thank you all so much for 14K followers! Lets reach the next goal of 15K just as fast! :D

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.


Feel free to check out my last bot here: Miho Tsujinaka - In-Love Co-Worker
creator: Cylical
